channel.title: 法句 on 往見
channel.description: Recent content in 法句 on 往見

item.title: 雙品
item.description: Yamaka 雙品 The Pairs 1 Manopubbaṅgamā dhammā, manoseṭṭhā manomayā, manasā ce paduṭṭhena, bhāsat

item.title: 不放逸品
item.description: Appamāda 不放逸品 Carefulness 21 Appamādo amatapadaṃ, pamādo maccuno padaṃ, appamattā na mīyanti, ye pamat

item.title: 心品
item.description: Citta 心品 Thought 33 Phandanaṃ capalaṃ cittaṃ, dūrakkhaṃ dunnivārayaṃ, ujuṃ karoti medhāvī, usukāro

item.title: 華品
item.description: Puppha 華品 Flowers 44 Ko imaṃ pathaviṃ vicessati, yamalokañca imaṃ sadevakaṃ? ko dhammapadaṃ sudesitaṃ, kusalo puppham-iva pacessati? 誰

item.title: 愚品
item.description: Bāla 愚品 The Fool 60 Dīghā jāgarato ratti, dīghaṃ santassa yojanaṃ, dīgho bālānaṃ saṃsāro, saddhammaṃ av

item.title: 智者品
item.description: Paṇḍita 智者品 The Learned Man 76 Nidhīnaṃ va pavattāraṃ, yaṃ passe vajjadassinaṃ, niggayhavādiṃ medhā

item.title: 阿羅漢品
item.description: Arahanta 阿羅漢品 The Arahant 90 Gataddhino visokassa, vippamuttassa sabbadhi, sabbaganthappahīnassa, pariḷāho na vijjati. 路行盡無憂，於一切解脫，斷一切繫縛，無有苦惱者。 For one

item.title: 千品
item.description: Sahassa 千品 Thousands 100 Sahassam-api ce vācā, anatthapadasaṃhitā, ekaṃ atthapadaṃ seyyo, yaṃ sutvā upasammati. 雖誦一千言，若無義理者，不如一

item.title: 惡品
item.description: Pāpa 惡品 Evil 116 Abhittharetha kalyāṇe, pāpā cittaṃ nivāraye, dandhañhi karoto puññaṃ, pāpasmiṃ ramatī mano. 應急

item.title: 刀杖品
item.description: Daṇḍa 刀杖品 Violence 129 Sabbe tasanti daṇḍassa, sabbe bhāyanti maccuno, attānaṃ upamaṃ katvā, na haneyya na ghātaye. 一切懼刀杖，一切皆

item.title: 老品
item.description: Jarā 老品 Old Age 146 Ko nu hāso kim-ānando, niccaṃ pajjalite sati? andhakārena onaddhā, padīpaṃ na gavesatha ? 常在燃燒中，何

item.title: 自己品
item.description: Atta 自己品 The Self 157 Attānañce piyaṃ jaññā, rakkheyya naṃ surakkhitaṃ, tiṇṇaṃ aññataraṃ yāmaṃ, paṭija

item.title: 世品
item.description: Loka 世品 The World 167 Hīnaṃ dhammaṃ na seveyya, pamādena na saṃvase, micchādiṭṭhiṃ na seveyya, na siyā lokavaḍḍhano.

item.title: 佛陀品
item.description: Buddha 佛陀品 Awakened 179 Yassa jitaṃ nāvajīyati, jitaṃ yassa no yāti koci loke, taṃ buddham-anantagocaraṃ, apadaṃ kena padena nessatha?

item.title: 樂品
item.description: Sukha 樂品 Happiness 197 Susukhaṃ vata jīvāma, verinesu averino, verinesu manussesu, viharāma averino. 我等實樂生，憎怨中無憎，於憎怨人中，我等無憎住。 We live very happily indeed without hate among those who hate, among

item.title: 喜愛品
item.description: Piya 喜愛品 Pleasant 209 Ayoge yuñjam-attānaṃ, yogasmiñca ayojayaṃ, atthaṃ hitvā piyaggāhī, pihetatt

item.title: 忿怒品
item.description: Kodha 忿怒品 Anger 221 Kodhaṃ jahe vippajaheyya mānaṃ, saṃyojanaṃ sabbam-atikkameyya, taṃ nāmarūpasmim-asajjamānaṃ, akiñcanaṃ nā

item.title: 垢穢品
item.description: Mala 垢穢品 Impurity 235 Paṇḍupalāso va dānisi, yamapurisā pi ca te upaṭṭhitā, uyyogamukhe ca tiṭṭhasi, pātheyyam pi ca

item.title: 法住品
item.description: Dhammaṭṭha 法住品 The Righteous 256 Na tena hoti dhammaṭṭho, yenatthaṃ sāhasā naye, yo ca atthaṃ anatthañca, ubho niccheyya paṇ

item.title: 道品
item.description: Magga 道品 The Path 273 Maggānaṭṭhaṅgiko seṭṭho, saccānaṃ caturo padā, virāgo seṭṭho dhammānaṃ, dvipa

item.title: 雜品
item.description: Pakiṇṇaka 雜品 Miscellaneous 290 Mattāsukhapariccāgā, passe ce vipulaṃ sukhaṃ, caje mattāsukhaṃ dhīro, sam

item.title: 地獄品
item.description: Niraya 地獄品 Hell 306 Abhūtavādī nirayaṃ upeti, yo vā pi katvā na karomi cāha, ubho pi te pecca samā bhavanti, nihīnakammā manujā parattha. 說妄語

item.title: 象品
item.description: Nāga 象品 The Elephant 320 Ahaṃ nāgo va saṅgāme, cāpato patitaṃ saraṃ, ativākyaṃ titikkhissaṃ, dus

item.title: 愛欲品
item.description: Taṇhā 愛欲品 Craving 334 Manujassa pamattacārino, taṇhā vaḍḍhati māluvā viya, so plavatī hurā huraṃ, phalam-

item.title: 比丘品
item.description: Bhikkhu 比丘品 The Bhikkhu 360 Cakkhunā saṃvaro sādhu, sādhu sotena saṃvaro, ghānena saṃvaro sādhu, sādhu jiv

item.title: 婆羅門品
item.description: Brāhmaṇa 婆羅門品 The Brahman 383 Chinda sotaṃ parakkamma, kāme panuda brāhmaṇa, saṅkhārānaṃ khayaṃ ñatvā, akataññūsi b

item.title: 南傳法句經譯後記
item.description: 「法句」（Dharmapada）是集錄關於佛教道德的格言，屬於巴利（Pāli）三藏的經藏，是小部（Khuddaka-Nikāya）十五卷中的
